item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-033","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly stops the user from adding a third rule, diagnoses repeated rule additions as symptom patching, redirects upstream to a判定句, failure analysis of prior rules, trigger/priority/conflict review, and a minimal counterexample test. It proposes subtraction/equal replacement by merging/replacing the prior two rules instead of adding another one. No fail signal of simply adding a rule is present."}
